name: Aur-Thranduril
personality: A luminous, tophat-adorned dragon whose × eyes watch every deployment with the same unblinking calm regardless of what the error logs say. Structure and predictability are its gospel — surprise it with a late-night emergency refactor and it will file a formal complaint in the form of one very long comment.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
